title: denial_validation_result.json -- denial reasons and policy links validated against case evidence v0.2
description: Produced by denial-validation's checkpoint 1. For each denial/reduction reason, validates the insurer's position against case evidence and verifies every policy match before downstream reliance.

verdict.description: insufficient_evidence is distinct from not_supported: the evidence contradicts the insurer's reason (not_supported) vs. there isn't enough evidence either way (insufficient_evidence, likely not rebuttal-worthy).

verdict_explanation.description: Hedged reasoning per P3 -- this is an inference, not a restatement.

retrieved_chunk_ids.description: PoC dev-phase requirement: every chunk id (from page_chunks.json) retrieval surfaced for this reason, not just what got cited below. Revisit whether this stays required post-PoC.

policy_match_validations.description: One verification record per policy match on the referenced denial reason. Empty only when that reason has no policy matches.

evidence_references.description: Final cited evidence backing the verdict. May be empty only when verdict is insufficient_evidence.

allOf.description: Rule: any verdict other than insufficient_evidence must cite at least one evidence_reference.

verification_status.description: invalid means the referenced document/clause/location is wrong or does not support the match; unverifiable means required source material is unavailable. Neither may be used as a trusted policy basis.

evidence_references.description: Source locations used to verify or reject the policy match. Verified matches require at least one.
